notable_new_2026_06_30.title: [Feature]: Make reasoning-effort control data-driven from ProviderRegistry
notable_new_2026_06_30.author: DeJeune
notable_new_2026_06_30.note: Detailed SSoT violation analysis — reasoning UI and injector use parallel heuristic ID-regex paths instead of registry descriptor. Failure modes A (control disabled), B (selection not serialized), C (silent coercion), D (empty descriptor). Proposed 5-step remediation.
15 issues batch-closed 2026-06-30 around 01:08 UTC with 'inactive' label (numbers #15181–#15197 range)
